title: Unused EoE dialogue from Death and Rebirth trailer
display_title: Unused EoE dialogue from Death and Rebirth trailer
wikitext:
[]: Unused EoE dialogue from Death and Rebirth trailer             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Oct 25, 2010 10:33 pm Somewhat frustrated because I'm searching for a thread where I translated Rei's speech from the start of this Death and Rebirth trailer but now I can't find it. I was really hoping to split/merge/bump into a thread for Death and Rebirth stuffs. (If anybody finds that post/thread, please link me to it!) So this other Death and Rebirth Trailer has some unused dialogue between Shinji and Rei. It somewhat calls to mind what's found here on MDwigs site , but I'm really not sure if they're related or not. (Was this bit of dialogue within the same unused(?) script for EoE, just in a different scene or what?) Interesting at any rate. Enjoy! Rei and Shinji wrote: Rei: Hate? Shinji: That's right. Shinji: I think I hate myself. Shinji: A lot of people were killed. Kaworu-kun was killed. Shinji: Misato-san died. Asuka died too. Shinji: I'm sick of this. It's all from piloting Eva. Rei (not Shinji): Ikari-kun, everyone is not dead. You know nothing. Shinji: I'm alone. No matter where I go, I'm lonely. Shinji: (mono) I'm an unwanted person after all! Rei: I see, I understand. Rei: You hate being alone, don't you.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Oct 25, 2010 11:16 pm The 26' draft we have available is a pretty early one; this dialogue must be from a later version. BTW, you mistook kowai for kirai . ("Are you afraid?", "You're afraid of being alone, aren't you?", etc.) Might be other mistakes, but that's one I could catch without any expenditure of effort. Also, the line you translated, "Rei (not Shinji): Ikari-kun, everyone is not dead. You know nothing." isn't even listed (maybe it's spoken only, can't check right now). Too bad the final script didn't bother to declare Asuka's death. What a pain.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Mon Oct 25, 2010 11:56 pm I searched for the topic that SSD mentioned but I couldn't find anything other than Lili's translation of the same trailer that has been translated in this thread. The 26' draft we have available is a pretty early one; this dialogue must be from a later version.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Oct 26, 2010 12:25 am Yeah, that's where I translated the Rei trailer stuff. Thanks! (And this Shinji/Rei exchange was translated before?! In a thread I replied to, no less. Jesus, I have a memory problem. Head, meet desk. ) Reichu : Thanks for the info. I was Internet-less for most of the weekend so I had to make-do with my PC programs.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Oct 26, 2010 1:26 am Hyper Shinchan wrote: If it's really from a draft of episode 26, I don't think we can be sure about it.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Tue Oct 26, 2010 2:30 pm Reichu wrote: Not 100% sure, but probably in the order of 99 point something. If you're doubtful, I'd recommend surveying both screenplays in their entirety (and that means in Japanese), and comparing that with screenplays we know Anno wrote, and also assessing the likelihood that a mockup posted online at the time the screenplays were would be likely to contain all of the references and allusions that we observe. They're a valuable resource, and we're damned lucky to have them.
